AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Worried about heavy flow? Libra Tampons Super is a comfortable and effective solution for your heavy-flow days. Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Start your day using Libra Body Fit Super Tampons, the everyday essential for when you have your period. Designed for heavy-flow days, typically around days 1-2, these tampons offer the ideal balance of comfort and protection. At the heart of our design is the tapered tip for easy and comfortable insertion. The unique anti-fluff base is a thoughtful addition that prevents fluffing when the string is released, ensuring a clean use. For total protection, these tampons are equipped with multi-directional grooves that provide 360° leak protection. This advanced feature adapts to your body's movements giving you peace of mind, whether you're at work, working out, or simply going about your day. With over 40 years' experience Libra is here to support you through every moment of your cycle.

Our tampons are designed to fit you, created to work with a wide range of flow levels and sizes. With Libra, experience the freedom to live boldly, even during 'that time of the month'. Here's to feeling fabulous, period.

Super absorbent for your heavy flow days: Each tampon quickly absorbs your period blood, featuring a multidimensional leak protection design

Comfortable from the get-go: Features a tapered tip for easy insertion and an anti-fluff base to prevent fluffing during removal

The everyday, go-to tampon: Designed with maximum comfort and protection in mind so you can tackle your daily activities with confidence

Mindful of you: These tampons are chlorine-free and made from rayon, derived from natural plant materials

Embrace the spirit of 'you do you': This pack of 32 tampons ensures you're covered for the period cycle so you can focus on making your mark on the world

Bundles.Name: Libra Tampons Super
Bundles.DisplayName: Libra Tampons Super 32 pack

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Nivea Men Deep Darkwood Antiperspirant Deodorant. Offers a clean feel and masculine Dark Wood fragrance. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
NIVEA MEN DEEP Darkwood Anti-Perspirant Aerosol delivers 72-hour protection against sweat and bacteria, keeping your skin dry and fresh with a masculine Darkwood scent—just like stepping out of the shower.

Stay dry and fresh with NIVEA MEN DEEP Darkwood Aerosol Deodorant. It protects your skin from sweat and bacteria for a long-lasting dryness and a clean skin feel, as if you’ve just stepped out of the shower. Keeps skin dry and fresh with antibacterial formula. The effective anti-bacterial formula with black carbon and MAXXTECH, works without leaving any visible black residue and is complemented by a modern and masculine Darkwood fragrance. Reliable 72 hour protection for a long-lasting dry and clean skin feeling, just like after a shower. Get the reliable protection and care that you deserve! The skin tolerance of this anti-perspirant has been dermatologically proven.



With Black Carbon and masculine scent Dark Wood

Powerful protection against bacteria

Long-lasting fragrance

No visible black residue

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection

Skin-tolerance dermatologically proven

TgaAttributes.ProductWarnings:
Extremely flammable aerosol. Pressurized container: May burst if heated. Keep away from heat, hot surfaces, sparks, open flames and other ignition sources. No smoking. Do not spray on an open flame or other ignition source. Do not pierce or burn, even after use. Protect from sunlight. Do not expose to temperatures exceeding 50C. Give only empty bottle to recycling process. Use exclusively for the intended purpose. Do not spray into eyes. Do not apply to irritated or damaged skin. Avoid prolonged spraying and direct inhalation. Keep out of reach of children. SOLVENT ABUSE CAN KILL INSTANTLY.

Ingredient listings for our products might change over time with new innovations. Whilst we try to update this as quickly as we can, it’s best to check the ingredients on your packaging to ensure it’s suitable for your needs.

AdditionalAttributes.description: Transform your underarms with NIVEA Pearl & Beauty Aerosol Anti-perspirant Deodorant. Enriched with natural pearl extracts and Avocado Oil, this anti-perspirant beautifies your underarms whilst providing soft, smooth skin. The scientifically formulated pearl extract helps even out skin tone for velvety, beautiful results. The formulas are skin tolerance dermatologically proven and do not contain ethyl alcohol. Our anti-perspirants offer Derma 72h Active protection: our products are working with the skin, for reliable and strong efficacy against sweat and odour and with kind-to-skin formulations. Enjoy a long-lasting, delicate floral fragrance that keeps you feeling fresh all day. Get the reliable protection and care that you deserve!

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Palmolive Foaming Liquid Hand Wash Antibacterial Soap Pump Lime. It kills 99.9% of germs, leaves hands soft, and has a refreshing lime scent. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Palmolive Antibacterial Lime & Mint Hand Wash is made with a natural antibacterial agent for healthy, beautiful hands. Contains 95% naturally derived ingredients, and kills 99.9% of germs.

Palmolive Antibacterial Lime & Mint Foaming Hand Wash is made with skin-loving ingredients and a natural antibacterial agent for healthy, beautiful hands. Kills 99.9% of germs.

A foamy formula infused with 100% natural lime & mint extracts, and contains 95% naturally derived ingredients.

Zest up your day with this sweet and tangy fragrance, a cocktail of lime and mint.

This formula is vegan and dermatologically tested.

Free from nasties:
- No parabens.
- No phthalates.
- No silicones.
- No mineral oil.
- No animal derived ingredients.

Please recycle. This bottle is recyclable, and made from 100% recycled plastic content (does not include pump). Refill your pump and save with Palmolive Hand Wash refills.

Suitable for the bathroom, kitchen and laundry.

Size: 250mL Pump.

FOAMING ANTIBACTERIAL HAND WASH: Kills 99.9% of germs with a naturally derived antibacterial agent.

95% NATURAL ORIGIN: Infused with 100% natural lime & mint extracts. Vegan and dermatologically tested.

SWEET TANGY FRAGRANCE: Zest up your day with this sweet and tangy fragrance, a cocktail of lime and mint.

FREE FROM: Parabens, phthalates, silicones, mineral oil, and animal derived ingredients.

RECYCLABLE: Palmolive Hand Wash bottles are recyclable, and made from 100% recycled plastic (does not include pump).

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Tired of marks? Nivea Black & White Invisible Roll On is a reliable solution for mark-free clothing and lasting freshness. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
NIVEA BLACK & WHITE INVISIBLE, with Dual Shield technology, provides white mark protection on black clothing & anti-yellow staining on white clothing. Reliable 72H sweat & odour anti-perspirant, that protects your skin & clothes.

NIVEA BLACK & WHITE INVISIBLE range, formulated with our innovative Dual Shield technology, provides powerful invisible protection for skin and clothes: it does not only offer protection to your skin from sweat, odour and irritation but it also protects the clothes from stains, residues and fabric damage. The result? It makes you feel confident and worry-free from skin to clothes. With its patented anti-stain formula, NIVEA Black & White Invisible anti-perspirants provide white mark protection on black clothing and anti-yellow staining on white clothing. Reliable 72H anti-perspirant protection, strong on sweat and odour, that also cares for your skin. The formulas skin tolerance is dermatologically proven and do not contain ethyl alcohol. Also available in an aerosol format.




White mark protection on black clothing & anti-yellow staining on white clothing

Reliable 72h anti-perspirant with dual shield technology that protects your skin & clothes

Anti: Odour, Sweat, Irritation, Stains, Residues, Fabric Damage

Delicate floral scent

DERMA 72H ACTIVE PROTECTION

Caring formula. Skin tolerance dermatologically proven

No ethyl alcohol

0% white residues

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Stay fresh? Rexona Women Advanced Antiperspirant Aerosol Invisible Pure is an effective solution for daily wear. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
REXONA ANTIPERSPIRANT AEROSOL WOMEN ADVANCED INVISIBLE PURE 220 ML

Rexona Women Advanced Protection Invisible Dry Pure Antiperspirant Deodorant provides nonstop protection to keep you feeling unstoppable. Everyone sweats – it's normal and healthy. But it shouldn't hold you back or slow you down. And that's where our Advanced Protection range comes in with 72 hours of powerful sweat and odour protection to keep you moving with confidence. Our Invisible Dry Pure antiperspirant deodorant features Body-Heat Activated activated sweat protection that keeps working, no matter how much you move. It responds when you need it most, keeping you perfectly dry and patch-free. In short, whether you’re having a long day at work, playing sports, working out in the gym or whatever the day throws at you, you can be confident you’ll be protected from sweat and odour with our tried and trusted antiperspirant deodorant for women. Our Advanced Protection antiperspirant deodorants work as hard as you do, keeping you protected and fresh so you can keep moving and stay active. Simply spray and get moving. It's that easy. At Rexona, we believe in moving together for a sustainable future. That's why all of our Advanced Protection deodorant cans are 100% recyclable and made in Australia using renewable electricity. Rexona. It won't let you down. *ethyl alcohol

Rexona Women Advanced Protection Invisible Dry Pure Antiperspirant Deodorant provides 72-hour sweat and odour protection

This aerosol deodorant features our unique Body-Heat Activated technology activated by movement – the more you move, the more it protects

Rexona Women antiperspirant deodorant is alcohol* free and easy to use – simply shake, spray and move

Our Advanced Protection antiperspirants provide nonstop protection for unstoppable freshness

Move together for a sustainable future – our deodorant cans are 100% recyclable and made in Australia with renewable electricity

At Rexona, we want to give you the confidence to move more and go further – with antiperspirant deodorant to help you go beyond your limits

TgaAttributes.ProductWarnings: CAUTION: Avoid direct inhalation. Use in short bursts in well-ventilated places, avoid prolonged spraying. Intentional misuse by deliberately concentrating and inhaling contents may be harmful or fatal. Do not apply to broken skin. Do not spray near eyes or face. Stop use if irritation develops.. WARNING: EXTREMELY FLAMMABLE. PRESSURISED CONTAINER - MAY BURST IF HEATED. KEEP AWAY FROM HEAT, HOT SURFACES, SPARKS, OPEN FLAMES AND OTHER IGNITION SOURCES. NO SMOKING. DO NOT SPRAY ON AN OPEN FLAME OR OTHER IGNITION SOURCE. DO NOT PIERCE OR BURN, EVEN AFTER USE. PROTECT FROM SUNLIGHT. DO NOT EXPOSE TO TEMPERATURES EXCEEDING 50C. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN.. DIAMOND FLAMMABLE SYMBOL,EXTREMELY FLAMMABLE Box Logo Do not apply to broken or sore skin. Stop use if irritation develops. Do not spray near eyes or face.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Enjoy Libra Tampons Regular, perfect for everyday confidence. It offers 360° leakage protection and a comfortable design. Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Start your day using Libra Body Fit Regular Tampons, the everyday essential for when you have your period. Designed for medium-flow days, typically around days 2-3, these tampons offer the ideal balance of comfort and protection. At the heart of our design is the tapered tip for easy and comfortable insertion. The unique anti-fluff base helps prevents fluffing when the string is released, ensuring a clean use. For total protection, these tampons are equipped with multi-directional grooves that provide 360° leak protection. This advanced feature adapts to your body's movements giving you peace of mind, whether you're at work, working out, or simply going about your day. With over 40 years' experience Libra is here to support you through every moment of your cycle.

Our tampons are designed to fit you, created to work with a wide range of flow levels and sizes. With Libra, experience the freedom to live boldly, even during 'that time of the month'. Here's to feeling fabulous, period.

Regular absorbency for your medium flow days: Each tampon quickly absorbs your period blood, featuring a multidimensional leak protection design

Comfortable from the get-go: Features a tapered tip for easy insertion and an anti-fluff base to prevent fluffing during removal

The everyday, go-to tampon: Designed with maximum comfort and protection in mind so you can tackle your daily activities with confidence

Mindful of you: These tampons are chlorine-free and made from rayon, derived from natural plant materials

Embrace the spirit of 'you do you': This pack of 16 tampons ensures you're covered for your period cycle so you can focus on making your mark on the world

Bundles.Name: Libra Tampons Regular
Bundles.DisplayName: Libra Tampons Regular 32 pack

AdditionalAttributes.ingredients: Water, Sorbitol, Hydrated Silica, Calcium Pyrophosphate, PEG-12,  Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Flavour, Cellulose Gum,  Potassium Hydroxide, Tetrasodium Pyrophosphate, Phosphoric Acid, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Fluoride, Benzyl Alcohol, Sodium Saccharin
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Colgate Advanced Whitening Tartar Control Toothpaste is made with active micro-cleansing crystals for whiter teeth in 7 days, preventing further tartar build-up.

Colgate Advanced Whitening Toothpaste Plus Tartar Control is a whitening paste with active Micro-Cleansing Crystals, clinically proven to gently polish and effectively whiten your teeth. It fights plaque and cavities to ensure your teeth stay as healthy and strong as they are white.

• Effectively removes stains
• Gentle for daily use
• Freshens breath
• Fights cavities & removes plaque

Tartar is a yellow mineral build-up that can dull the natural whiteness of your teeth. The formula contains ingredients to help prevent tartar from sticking to your teeth and effectively whiten your teeth, lifting off stains to give you whiter teeth in 7 days.

Colgate Advanced Whitening Tartar Control Toothpaste is sugar free, gluten free and vegan. Made in a recyclable tube (does not include cap).

Boxed Contents: 1 Toothpaste
Size: 200g

Smile on!

We believe glowing confidently starts by owning your smile. It doesn't matter what others think, as long as you keep your smile strong you can rock your day.

Clinically proven to effectively whiten your teeth, we're here to help you be unstoppable. So Flaunt your look and feel your best, knowing there is a little magic in every white smile.

WHITER TEETH IN 7 DAYS: Use Colgate Advanced Whitening Tartar Control toothpaste for whiter teeth in 7 days

CLINICALLY PROVEN: Micro-cleansing crystals help polish away surface stains from the enamel to promote the natural whiteness of teeth

TARTAR CONTROL: Formula prevents tartar from sticking to teeth and lifts off stains

CAVITY PROTECTION: Fights cavities, removes plaque and freshens breath

DAILY USE: Fluoride formula, gentle for daily use

Bundles.Name: Colgate Whitening Toothpaste Advanced Whiten Tartar Control
Bundles.DisplayName: Colgate Whitening Toothpaste Advanced Whiten Tartar Control 200g

Palmolive Antibacterial Liquid Hand Wash Soap Odour Neutralising Lime kills 99.9% of germs. It's special formula with lime extract cleans your hands whilst neutralising the strong odours that can linger after preparing food (such as onions, garlic and fish).

Freshen up your day with this zingy cleanser with notes of Lime and Citrus.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Libra Tampons Regular 16pk. A reliable product with 360° protection, it's ideal for medium-flow days. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Start your day using Libra Body Fit Regular Tampons, the everyday essential for when you have your period. Designed for medium-flow days, typically around days 2-3, these tampons offer the ideal balance of comfort and protection.

Start your day using Libra Body Fit Regular Tampons, the everyday essential for when you have your period. Designed for medium-flow days, typically around days 2-3, these tampons offer the ideal balance of comfort and protection. At the heart of our design is the tapered tip for easy and comfortable insertion. The unique anti-fluff base helps prevents fluffing when the string is released, ensuring a clean use. For total protection, these tampons are equipped with multi-directional grooves that provide 360° leak protection. This advanced feature adapts to your body's movements giving you peace of mind, whether you're at work, working out, or simply going about your day. With over 40 years' experience Libra is here to support you through every moment of your cycle.

Our tampons are designed to fit you, created to work with a wide range of flow levels and sizes. With Libra, experience the freedom to live boldly, even during 'that time of the month'. Here's to feeling fabulous, period.

Regular absorbency for your medium flow days: Each tampon quickly absorbs your period blood, featuring a multidimensional leak protection design

Comfortable from the get-go: Features a tapered tip for easy insertion and an anti-fluff base to prevent fluffing during removal

The everyday, go-to tampon: Designed with maximum comfort and protection in mind so you can tackle your daily activities with confidence

Mindful of you: These tampons are chlorine-free and made from rayon, derived from natural plant materials

Embrace the spirit of 'you do you': This pack of 16 tampons ensures you're covered for your period cycle so you can focus on making your mark on the world

Bundles.Name: Libra Tampons Regular
Bundles.DisplayName: Libra Tampons Regular 16 pack

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Libra Tampons Super. A comfortable product with 360° leakage protection, it's ideal for everyday use. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Start your day using Libra Body Fit Super Tampons, the everyday essential for when you have your period. Designed for heavy-flow days, typically around days 1-2, these tampons offer the ideal balance of comfort and protection.

Start your day using Libra Body Fit Super Tampons, the everyday essential for when you have your period. Designed for heavy-flow days, typically around days 1-2, these tampons offer the ideal balance of comfort and protection. At the heart of our design is the tapered tip for easy and comfortable insertion. The unique anti-fluff base is a thoughtful addition that prevents fluffing when the string is released, ensuring a clean use. For total protection, these tampons are equipped with multi-directional grooves that provide 360° leak protection. This advanced feature adapts to your body's movements giving you peace of mind, whether you're at work, working out, or simply going about your day. With over 40 years' experience Libra is here to support you through every moment of your cycle.

Our tampons are designed to fit you, created to work with a wide range of flow levels and sizes. With Libra, experience the freedom to live boldly, even during 'that time of the month'. Here's to feeling fabulous, period.

Super absorbent for your heavy flow days: Each tampon quickly absorbs your period blood, featuring a multidimensional leak protection design

Comfortable from the get-go: Features a tapered tip for easy insertion and an anti-fluff base to prevent fluffing during removal

The everyday, go-to tampon: Designed with maximum comfort and protection in mind so you can tackle your daily activities with confidence

Mindful of you: These tampons are chlorine-free and made from rayon, derived from natural plant materials

Embrace the spirit of 'you do you': This pack of 16 tampons ensures you're covered for the period cycle so you can focus on making your mark on the world

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Palmolive Naturals Milk & Honey Body Wash. A gentle product with natural milk & honey extracts, it's ideal for daily skin care. Shop now!
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Palmolive Naturals Body Wash Milk & Honey is 95% natural origin. It has a moisturising, plant-based almond milk formula with Vitamin E & glycerin to leave your skin feeling soft and nourished.

We're here to make great skincare products without complexity or compromise.

Our Palmolive Naturals Milk & Honey Body Wash has a moisturising, plant-based Almond milk formula with vitamin E & glycerin to leave your skin feeling soft and nourished.

At Palmolive we're all about giving you more of what you love and less of what you don't.

That's why this body wash is infused with 100% nautral Almond Milk & Honey extracts and has a light and sweet honey scent with warm milky tones

What we leave out is as important as what we put in:
- No Parabens
- No Phthalates
- No Mineral Oil
- No Silicones
- No Soap
- No Gluten
- No BPA

This body wash product has been formulated with skin loving ingredients and is dermatologically tested and pH balanced to suit your skin.

I'm Recycled! Re-recycle me! This bottle is 100% recyable and made from 100% recycled plastic, does not include Pump.

Pack size: 1L Body wash

BODY WASH INFUSED WITH NATURAL EXTRACTS: Palmolive Naturals Milk & Honey Body Wash is infused with 100% Natural Almond Milk & Honey Extracts and Vitamin E to nourish your skin.

FORMULATED WITH SKIN LOVING INGREDIENTS: Our Palmolive Naturals Body Wash are made with skin loving ingredients which are dermatologically tested and pH Balanced to suit your skin.

MORE OF WHAT YOU LOVE AND LESS OF WHAT YOU DON'T: Palmolive Shower Gel are FREE from Parabens, Phthalates, Mineral Oil, Silicones, Soap, Animal Derivatives, Gluten and BPA.

LIGHT & SWEET: Palmolive Milk & Honey Shower Gel is made with a light and sweet honey scent with warm milky tones

RECYCLABLE: Palmolive Naturals Body Wash bottle is 100% recyclable and made from 100% recycled plastic, does not include pump.
